textByHashes.e2e65e98ca3edb186e5a6c20a2654d63c16a5291: Who are you and what do you want?
textByHashes.6683ae7dad359c3e04ca6a9a67c654516c6ca1de: Not in my house. Be gone!
textByHashes.4f175d5045d5cefb8739608be03950a886ff3990: What do you want them for?
textByHashes.3933f415557187d739950251554db0e1f2e8c2c2: In that case I'm sorry, but you can't. I have had a falling out with him recently and would rather not oblige him.
textByHashes.ba14be65c68668a40e7a56ef2e7833d47b762cb0: In that case I'm sorry, but you can't. I have had a falling out with his master recently and would rather not oblige him.
